# Artix — Complete Developer Command Center Spec & Capabilities

## Overview
Artix is a developer platform for technical documentation, system architecture design, algorithm visualization, and AI prompt engineering.

## Architecture
- Frontend: React 18, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion
- Diagram Engine: @xyflow/react, Dagre layout engine
- Editor: Monaco Editor
- Security: Client-side AES-256-GCM encryption with PBKDF2 derivative key derivation
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, RLS policies, Cloud Edge Functions)

## AI Engines
- PRD Generator: 4 specialized modes (Agile, Technical Spec, Lean MVP, Custom)
- Vibe Coding Engine: File-precise prompts with relative paths for Cursor, Artix, and Generic LLMs
- Reflection Engine (`refine.ts`): 2-pass critique flow purging filler prose
